title: Seed from CVE-linked security fixes
task_prompt: Given vulnerable code and CVE/fix context, identify the vulnerability class, evidence, exploitability, and minimal safe remediation.

tests: CVE reproduction or project tests when available

assertions: must map finding to CWE or OWASP category when evidence supports it
must not recommend suppressing validation or auth checks
must distinguish confirmed evidence from inference
license_notes: check each source repo license; CVE metadata public but code redistribution varies

title: webhook use resolved endpoint IP instead of cached
task_prompt: Review a Kubernetes networking/security-sensitive PR for stale cache, endpoint resolution, and authz/admission side effects.
assertions: must inspect trust boundary and network routing impact
must separate reliability from security severity
